user_query: I'd like to end the first day with some live music. Add Pj O'Brien's to the end of Day 1.

fields.name: P.J. O'Brien's
fields.description: Traditional Irish pub offering a lively, casual atmosphere with regular live music sessions—great for a relaxed late-night drink and tunes after dinner.

insertion_point.reasoning: User requested to end Day 1 with live music at P.J. O'Brien's. Position -1 appends it after the 7:30–9:00 PM dinner (Canoe); scheduled 9:30–11:30 PM for post-dinner live music.
